the_story.name: Hello World!
the_story.p2: I am a web developer currently focused on building and maintaining web applications.
the_story.p3: I am always open to meaningful conversations, knowledge sharing, and new opportunities. If you'd like to connect, don't hesitate to reach out.

technologies.title: Core Technologies
technologies.php_desc: 2 years of experience in enterprise system development and maintenance.
technologies.vue_desc: Building modern, reactive UIs with Composition API and component-based architecture.
technologies.linux_desc: Daily development environment, system administration, and server deployment.
technologies.db_desc: Database design, query optimization, and data modeling for various applications.
technologies.other_desc: AI tools integration, technical documentation, Git, Docker, and development workflows.
